criminal_summary.case_numbers_xls: GH காவல் நிலைய முகவரியுடன் குற்ற எண். 20/2024 / GH Police Station Crime No. 20/2024 (JM II Erode STC No. 1556/2025, இந்திய தண்டனை சட்டம் பிரிவு 171 (H) / Indian Penal Code Section 171 (H), தேர்தல் விதியை மீறியதாக / Violation of election rules, குற்றச்சாட்டுகள் பதியப் பட்டுள்ளனவா ஆம் / Charges framed: Yes, குற்றச்சாட்டுக்கள் பதிவு செய்த நாளைக் குறிப்படவும் 09.09.2025 / Date of framing charges: 09.09.2025)

ipc_charges: 1 charges related to Illegal payments in connection with an election (IPC Section-171H)

discrepancies.title: Net Worth vs Income Reconciliation Failure
discrepancies.description: Calculated Net Worth is ₹91,684,702, but 5-year family income is only ₹6,295,520. Unexplained wealth discrepancy of ₹85,389,182.

discrepancies.title: Suspicious Property Overvaluation
discrepancies.description: Self Agricultural Land purchased in 2019 for ₹2,136,000 (CII Indexed Cost: ₹2,779,017) is declared at highly inflated value of ₹11,000,000.

discrepancies.title: Gold Heavily Undervalued (Tax/Duty Evasion)
discrepancies.description: 154.0g gold declared at ₹1,540,000 (Implied rate: ₹10,000/g vs April 2026 Market Rate of ~₹14,200/g).

discrepancies.title: Data Quality / Typo Anomaly
discrepancies.description: Found data quality issues: Invalid Date (0000-00-00)

discrepancies.title: Mathematical Mismatch (Assets)
discrepancies.description: Sum of individual assets (₹91,684,702) does not match declared total assets (₹231,071,042). Difference: ₹139,386,340
